title: Israeli Air Strikes and Shelling Across Lebanon Add to Rising Death Toll
detail: Israeli air strikes and artillery shelling across Lebanon continued on April 5, contributing to a rising death toll, according to Al Jazeera video reporting. The strikes represent continued Israeli military operations in the Lebanese theater as the wider regional conflict persists alongside the ongoing Gaza campaign.

title: Israel Continues Deadly Gaza Attacks While Escalating Strikes on Iran and Lebanon
detail: Israel continued deadly attacks on Gaza on April 5 while simultaneously striking Iran and Lebanon, escalating multi-front military operations. The broadened offensive marks a significant expansion of the conflict beyond the Gaza theater, with airstrikes conducted against targets in all three fronts in a single operational period, per Al Jazeera reporting.

title: Rodent Infestations Spread Through Gaza Tent Camps, Raising Disease Risk
detail: Rodent infestations are spreading across Gaza's displaced civilian tent camps, compounding the humanitarian catastrophe facing over one million displaced Palestinians. The vermin spread poses serious disease risks—including leptospirosis and hantavirus—in overcrowded shelters lacking adequate sanitation. Al Jazeera reported both the infestations and continued attacks on tent camp areas on April 5, 2026.

title: UK Police Arrest Seven Protesters Near RAF Lakenheath in Anti-War Demonstration
detail: UK police arrested seven protesters near RAF Lakenheath, a Suffolk base used by US forces, during demonstrations opposing US and UK military support for operations in Gaza and the broader Middle East. The arrests reflect growing civil unrest in Western countries over continued Anglo-American backing for Israeli military operations.
